pr.title: Non-record: 11L int5/int6 + XSA + online TTT w/ decay prior (single-run val_bpb=1.1520)

output.summary: Non-record 11L int5/int6 model adds pre-Q/K RMSNorm, last-3-layer XSA, and Krause-decay online causal TTT with Reptile meta-learning.
techniques: Pre-Q/K RMSNorm stabilizes RoPE-facing Q/K path under int5/int6
Online causal TTT with Krause-style decay prior adapting last three MLP blocks
Reptile meta-learning in the final 10% to prime eval-time adaptation
